Metadata.title: Anas — Full-Stack JS Developer & Cybersecurity Consultant
Metadata.description: Portfolio of Anas, full-stack JavaScript developer (React, Next.js, Node.js) and cybersecurity consultant based in France. 2+ years of experience, freelance available.

HackTheBox.title: HackTheBox Machines
HackTheBox.desc: Here are the machines I've pwned on HackTheBox as part of my offensive cybersecurity practice.
HackTheBox.defaultDescription: HackTheBox machine "{name}" compromised during a pentest exercise — reconnaissance, exploitation and privilege escalation up to the root flag.
HackTheBox.error: Could not load HackTheBox machines right now.
HackTheBox.empty: No pwned machines to show yet.

descriptions.Lame: Starter Linux box exploiting a Samba vulnerability (CVE-2007-2447) leading to remote command execution as root.
descriptions.Legacy: Old Windows XP vulnerable to MS08-067 and MS17-010 — a classic to understand SMB exploits.
descriptions.Blue: Windows 7 vulnerable to EternalBlue (MS17-010), the iconic exploit behind WannaCry.
descriptions.Devel: Windows IIS with anonymous FTP open — upload an aspx webshell and escalate via MS11-046.
descriptions.Jerry: Tomcat server with default manager credentials, deploying a malicious WAR for a SYSTEM shell.
descriptions.Bashed: An exposed phpbash gives a www-data shell, then privilege escalation via a misconfigured cron job.
